summary: Iteration 23 - Payment Flow Testing Complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Login page has no postMessage errors, admin login works and redirects correctly, Razorpay Payments tab shows payment records with correct INR amounts (2000/5000/10000), credit packages correctly configured in both frontend and backend.

admin_login.details: Admin login with info@kaimeralearning.com / solidarity&peace2023 works correctly, redirects to admin-dashboard

no_postmessage_errors.details: Login page loads without postMessage errors. @react-oauth/google and react-razorpay packages completely removed from codebase. Google OAuth uses manual GIS script loading on button click.

recharge_pack_2000.details: POST /api/payments/recharge with pack_2000 creates Razorpay order with 200000 paise (INR 2000)

recharge_pack_5000.details: POST /api/payments/recharge with pack_5000 creates Razorpay order with 500000 paise (INR 5000)

recharge_pack_10000.details: POST /api/payments/recharge with pack_10000 creates Razorpay order with 1000000 paise (INR 10000)

verify_recharge_endpoint.details: POST /api/payments/verify-recharge validates signature and requires all payment data fields

my_payments_endpoint.details: GET /api/payments/my-payments returns user's payment history as list

receipt_pdf_endpoint.details: GET /api/payments/receipt-pdf/{payment_id} requires auth, returns 404 for non-existent payment, supports ?token= query param for download-in-new-tab

my_transactions_endpoint.details: GET /api/student/my-transactions requires student role (returns 403 for admin)

teacher_start_class_payment_check.details: POST /api/classes/start/{class_id} checks assignment.payment_status != 'paid' and returns 400 'Cannot start class: Student payment is still pending.' for non-demo classes

student_dashboard_unpaid_section.details: StudentDashboard shows 'Payment Required' section for unpaid assignments with 'UNPAID' badge and 'Pay Now' button (data-testid='pay-now-{id}')

student_dashboard_paid_section.details: StudentDashboard shows 'Active Enrollments' section for paid assignments (data-testid='paid-assignment-{id}')

student_dashboard_quick_actions.details: StudentDashboard has Wallet (data-testid='wallet-button'), Attendance (data-testid='attendance-button'), Chat (data-testid='chat-button') buttons

browse_classes_packages.details: BrowseClasses page shows 3 credit packages: INR 2000, 5000 (POPULAR), 10000 with data-testid='credit-package-{id}'

wallet_page_receipts.details: WalletPage shows balance, payment receipts with download button (data-testid='download-receipt-{id}'), transaction history table

razorpay_payments_admin_tab.details: Admin Dashboard > Financials > Razorpay Payments shows filter by student name, date range, Total Revenue display, payments table with Date/Student/Teacher/Plan/Amount/Status/Receipt columns

removed_packages.details: No @react-oauth/google or react-razorpay imports found in frontend. GoogleOAuthProvider wrapper removed from App.js. Razorpay loads on-demand via script tag.

test_credentials.note: Fresh MongoDB - only admin account exists. Test payment orders created during testing (status: created, not paid).

seed_data_creation: Created test Razorpay orders via API tests (pack_2000, pack_5000, pack_10000) - visible in admin Razorpay Payments tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow fully implemented and tested: 1) Credit recharge packages INR 2000/5000/10000 working. 2) Razorpay order creation verified. 3) Receipt PDF endpoint with token auth support. 4) Teacher start-class blocks if student payment pending. 5) StudentDashboard shows unpaid/paid assignment sections. 6) WalletPage shows receipts with download. 7) @react-oauth/google and react-razorpay removed - using on-demand script loading. 8) No postMessage errors on login page. Frontend .env URL was corrupted and fixed.
